attributes.name: Script Interpreter Executing VBScript from User Directory
attributes.description: Detects wscript.exe or cscript.exe executing VBScript (.vbs/.vbe) files from user-writable directories. TA453 NICECURL is delivered via LNK files that trigger wscript.exe to run a VBScript backdoor. This detection catches any VBScript execution from non-standard locations regardless of the specific malware family.
attributes.query: process where event.type == "start" and process.name : ("wscript.exe", "cscript.exe") and process.args : ("*.vbs", "*.vbe") and not process.args : ("*\\SYSVOL\\*", "*\\NETLOGON\\*", "*\\Program Files\\*", "*\\Windows\\System32\\*") and not process.parent.name : ("services.exe", "svchost.exe")

technique.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: Visual Basic

author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder

attributes.name: WMI SecurityCenter2 AntiVirusProduct Query
attributes.description: Detects wmic.exe queries to the SecurityCenter2 namespace for AntiVirusProduct enumeration. NICECURL uses WMI to identify installed security software before proceeding with operations. This is a common pre-exploitation technique used by Iranian APT tooling to assess target environment risk.
attributes.query: process where event.type == "start" and process.name : "wmic.exe" and process.args : "*SecurityCenter2*" and process.args : "*AntiVirusProduct*" and not process.parent.name : ("MsMpEng.exe", "mmc.exe", "svchost.exe")
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder
false_positives: AV products querying their own status

attributes.name: curl.exe HTTPS POST to PaaS Hosting Domain
attributes.description: Detects curl.exe making outbound HTTPS POST requests to PaaS hosting platforms (Glitch.me, Herokuapp, Replit). TA453 NICECURL uses curl.exe as a Living off the Land binary for C2 communication to Glitch.me infrastructure, blending malicious traffic with legitimate developer activity.
attributes.query: process where event.type == "start" and process.name : "curl.exe" and process.args : ("-X", "POST", "--data", "-d") and process.args : ("*glitch.me*", "*glitch.io*", "*herokuapp.com*", "*replit.dev*")
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder
false_positives: Developers testing APIs against PaaS platforms

attributes.name: LNK File with Double Extension Masquerading as Document
attributes.description: Detects creation of Windows Shell Link (.lnk) files with double extensions that masquerade as documents (e.g., .pdf.lnk, .doc.lnk). TA453 delivers NICECURL via LNK files named like onedrive-form.pdf.lnk that exploit Windows hiding of known file extensions to trick users into executing the shortcut.
attributes.query: file where event.type == "creation" and file.name regex~ """.*\.(pdf|doc|docx|xls|xlsx|ppt|pptx)\.lnk$"""
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder
false_positives: Very unlikely - double extensions on LNK files are almost always malicious

attributes.name: curl.exe Spawned by Script Interpreter
attributes.description: Detects curl.exe being spawned by wscript.exe, cscript.exe, cmd.exe, or powershell.exe for outbound HTTPS connections. This pattern indicates a script using curl.exe as a LotL tool for data exfiltration or C2 communication, which is characteristic of NICECURL and similar VBScript-based backdoors.
attributes.query: process where event.type == "start" and process.name : "curl.exe" and process.args : "https://*" and process.parent.name : ("wscript.exe", "cscript.exe", "cmd.exe", "powershell.exe")
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder
false_positives: Admin scripts using curl for legitimate HTTP operations
